## Problem

What user or developer problem should this solve?

## Proposed behaviour

What should Truth-AI do?

## Determinism impact

Does this touch `src/truthkernel/`, schemas, hashing, replay, golden fixtures or
the ledger?

## Alternatives

Any simpler approach, adapter-only approach, or documentation-only approach?
